business.geography_hint: New Zealand (Mackenzie / West Coast, Lake Tekapo & Franz Josef)

engine.ladder_reasoning: The decision is driven by browsing scenic imagery, flight routes/maps, base locations and per-flight pricing — you're checking out an experience-place, not evaluating a SaaS feature set or trusting an individual's credentials.

goal.one_action: book a scenic flight (or send an enquiry about one)

structure.archetype_note: Photo-led tourism marketing site: category flight pages with pricing tables + route maps, contact/enquiry page, booking handed off to a separate /book-now/ engine.

mapped.observed_as: Air Safaris: Spectacular Scenic Flights New Zealand (intro copy)
Why Fly Air Safaris? (every seat a window seat, alpine pilots, family-owned since 1970)
HERE'S MORE TO Inspire You (flight product/inspiration cards)
The highlights of the Grand Traverse flight include

unmapped.why_no_fit: Customer-facing downloadable assets attached to a product page; no canonical section id covers an asset-download block

unmapped.observed: Lake Tekapo / Franz Josef base location blocks with embedded maps
unmapped.why_no_fit: Multi-base map+hours blocks are a capability, not a distinct section beyond footer/contact

proposed_new.name: external-booking-redirect
proposed_new.evidence: Primary 'Book Now' CTA hands off to a separate off-site /book-now/ booking system; main site has no cart/checkout or on-site scheduling (oddities note).

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; clear multi-page tourism site with explicit CTAs, forms, pricing and external-booking oddity captured.

gap_findings: Booking conversion is delegated to a separate off-site engine — matches proposed external-booking-redirect (not expressible by closed vocab).
Trilingual site (EN/ZH/JA) exceeds the binary 'bilingual' capability — coverage vocab has no multilingual (3+) flag.
Customer-facing PDF download list (flight guides) has no canonical section/component.
